use_cases: Display status indicators with semantic color variants (success, warning, destructive)
Show categorical labels or tags with customizable appearance styles
Present compact informational badges with optional dot indicators
ai_summary: A flexible badge component with multiple color variants (primary, secondary, success, warning, info, destructive, outline) and appearance styles (default, light, ghost). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant composition, supporting three sizes (sm, md, lg) and disabled states. Uses Radix UI Slot for composition and CSS variables for theming flexibility.
